title: Start The Tip Cycle And Complete Post-Tip Bag Handling
summary: Operator procedure for starting a tip cycle after an AGV has staged at the tipper, then completing the source-described post-tip bag handling: respond to the bag label prompt, label the bag, place it on the takeaway, and hang the next empty bag.
when_to_use: Use when an AGV has reached the tip location and the system has indicated the AGV is staged for a tip at the tipper, and the operator needs to start the tip and complete the associated bag handling sequence.
not_for: Do not use if the AGV has not staged for a tip at the tipper.
Do not use to perform unsupported recovery, fault handling, or additional operator actions not described by the source.
Do not use as a detailed HMI or control-name reference; the source does not provide exact control or screen names.

responsibilities: Wait for AGV staging at the tipper.
Push the button to start the tip.
Observe the tipper clamp and tip sequence.
Watch for the bag label print prompt chat message.
Apply the bag label after the empty tote is returned to the AGV.
Place the labeled bag on the takeaway.

safety_notes: Use only the operator actions explicitly described by the source.
Do not add unsupported actions, timing logic, or recovery steps beyond button press, observation, label handling, takeaway placement, and next-bag setup.
access_or_tools_needed: Operator access to the tipper station

access_required: Operator access to the tipper station
system_preconditions: AGV has reached the tip location.
System has indicated the AGV is staged for a tip at the tipper.

visual_references.description: Training video frame describing AGV staging at the tipper, operator start-tip action, tipper clamp/tip sequence, bag label prompt, bag labeling, takeaway placement, and next empty bag preparation.

steps.title: Confirm AGV is staged for tip
steps.purpose: Ensure the tip cycle is only started after the AGV has reached the tip location and staged at the tipper.
steps.instruction: Wait for the AGV to reach the tip location and for the system to indicate that the AGV has staged for a tip at the tipper.
steps.expected_result: The AGV is at the tip location and staged for tip.
steps.healthy_condition: AGV is at the tipper tip location and the source-described staged-for-tip condition has been reached.
steps.failure_condition: AGV has not reached the tip location or is not staged for tip.

actions.label: Verify AGV staging
actions.exact_action: Wait for the AGV to reach the tip location and for the system to indicate that the AGV has staged for a tip at the tipper.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Slide/frame content describing a full tote on an AGV being moved to the tipper, staged for tip, and reported to the tipper controller via OPC.

stop_or_escalate_if: AGV has not staged for a tip.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The AGV travels to the tip location and the software informs the tipper controller using OPC that the AGV has staged for a tip.

steps.title: Start the tip
steps.purpose: Initiate the tip cycle using the operator control described by the source.
steps.instruction: Use the operator control to push the button to start the tip.
steps.expected_result: The tip cycle starts after the operator button press.
steps.healthy_condition: The source-described tip sequence begins after the button is pressed.
steps.failure_condition: The tip does not start after the operator presses the button.

actions.label: Press start-tip button
actions.exact_action: Push the button to start the tip.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Frame/slide text stating that the operator pushes a button to start the tip.
Tipper station/operator station slide showing operator controls and ready-to-tip button context.

stop_or_escalate_if: The tipper does not perform the expected behavior after the start action.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: An operator pushes a button to start the tip. Software monitors tip progress and sends a chat message to prompt bag label printing. After the tip, the operator labels the bag, places it on a takeaway, and hangs the next empty bag.

steps.title: Observe clamp and tip sequence
steps.purpose: Confirm the tipper performs the expected source-described motion after tip start.
steps.instruction: Observe that the tipper clamps the tote and performs the tip as described by the source.
steps.expected_result: The tipper clamps the tote and completes the tip motion.
steps.healthy_condition: The tote is clamped and tipped by the tipper.
steps.failure_condition: The tipper does not clamp the tote or does not perform the tip as expected.

actions.label: Observe tipper motion
actions.exact_action: Observe that the tipper clamps the tote and performs the tip as described by the source.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Slide/frame text describing that the tipper clamps the tote and software monitors tip progress.
Tipper station slide showing clamp and tipping arm operation.

stop_or_escalate_if: Tipper does not clamp the tote.
Tipper does not perform the expected tip behavior after the start action.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The operator pushes a button to start the tip, the tipper clamps the tote, software monitors tip progress...

steps.title: Watch for bag label prompt
steps.purpose: Identify the source-described prompt that indicates bag label printing should occur during the tip cycle.
steps.instruction: Watch for the source-described chat message prompt to print a bag label if the tip cycle has started.
steps.expected_result: A chat message prompt to print a bag label is observed.
steps.healthy_condition: The source-described chat message prompt appears during monitored tip progress.
steps.failure_condition: The expected bag label prompt is not observed.

actions.label: Monitor for label prompt
actions.exact_action: Watch for the source-described chat message prompt to print a bag label if the tip cycle has started.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Slide/frame text stating that software monitors tip progress and sends a chat message to prompt bag label printing.

stop_or_escalate_if: The source-described bag label prompt is not observed when expected.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Software monitors tip progress and sends a chat message to prompt bag label printing.

steps.title: Apply the bag label
steps.purpose: Complete the source-described labeling task after the empty tote is returned to the AGV.
steps.instruction: After the empty tote is returned to the AGV, apply the bag label to the bag.
steps.healthy_condition: Bag label has been applied to the bag after the tip cycle return condition described by the source.
steps.failure_condition: Bag is not labeled or label application cannot be completed.

actions.label: Label the bag
actions.exact_action: After the empty tote is returned to the AGV, apply the bag label to the bag.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Slide/frame text describing empty tote return to the AGV and operator bag labeling.

stop_or_escalate_if: The empty tote is not returned to the AGV as described.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The empty tote is returned to the AGV, and the operator applies the bag label...

steps.title: Place the labeled bag on the takeaway
steps.purpose: Move the completed labeled bag to the next source-described destination.
steps.instruction: Place the labeled bag on the takeaway.
steps.expected_result: The labeled bag is placed on the takeaway.
steps.healthy_condition: Labeled bag is on the takeaway.
steps.failure_condition: Labeled bag is not placed on the takeaway.

actions.label: Move bag to takeaway
actions.exact_action: Place the labeled bag on the takeaway.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Slide/frame text stating that the operator places the bag on a takeaway.

stop_or_escalate_if: The labeled bag cannot be placed on the takeaway.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: After the tip, the operator labels the bag, places it on a takeaway...

steps.title: Hang the next empty bag
steps.purpose: Prepare the station for the next tip cycle.
steps.instruction: Hang the next empty bag for the next tip.
steps.expected_result: A replacement empty bag is hung and ready for the following tip.
steps.healthy_condition: Next empty bag is in place for the next cycle.
steps.failure_condition: Next empty bag is not hung or station is not prepared for the next tip.

actions.label: Prepare next bag
actions.exact_action: Hang the next empty bag for the next tip.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Slide/frame text stating that the operator hangs the next empty bag.

stop_or_escalate_if: The next empty bag cannot be hung or prepared.

success_criteria: The tip cycle is started after the AGV is staged at the tipper.
The tipper clamps the tote and performs the tip as described by the source.
The bag label prompt is observed.
The bag is labeled after the empty tote is returned to the AGV.
The labeled bag is placed on the takeaway.
The next empty bag is hung for the following tip.
healthy_conditions: AGV is staged for tip at the tipper.
Tip starts after operator button press.
Tipper clamps and tips the tote.
Software-generated chat message prompts bag label printing.
Bag is labeled and moved to the takeaway.
failure_conditions: AGV does not stage for tip.
Tip does not start after button press.
Tipper does not clamp or tip as expected.
Bag label prompt is not observed.
Labeled bag is not placed on the takeaway.
Next empty bag is not hung.
escalation_guidance: Stop and escalate if the AGV has not staged for a tip.
Stop and escalate if the tipper does not perform the expected clamp and tip behavior after the start action.
Do not add unsupported recovery or alternate operator actions beyond those described by the source.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall source frame covering AGV staging, start-tip action, tipper clamp/tip, bag label prompt, bag labeling, takeaway placement, and next empty bag setup.
Tipper station/operator station context showing operator controls and clamp/tip operation.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: The AGV travels to the tip location and the software informs the tipper controller using OPC that the AGV has staged for a tip.

An operator pushes a button to start the tip. Software monitors tip progress and sends a chat message to prompt bag label printing. After the tip, the operator labels the bag, places it on a takeaway, and hangs the next empty bag.

missing_details: Exact button/control name is not provided by the source.
Exact screen or chat interface name for the bag label prompt is not provided by the source.
The source does not provide detailed fault recovery steps for missing label prompts or failed tip behavior within this procedure.
The source does not provide a time estimate for completing the procedure.
The source does not specify whether production stop or LOTO is required.
